amazon_side_asn.description: The ASN (Autonomous System Number) for the Amazon side of the VPN connection.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the VPN gateway.

attached_vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC to which the VPN gateway is attached.

availability_zone.description: The availability zone of the VPN gateway.

id.description: The unique ID of the VPN gateway.

state.description: The current state of the VPN gateway (e.g., available, pending).

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the VPN gateway.
